{{CargoRelic
|name=Maple Leaf Bookmark
|class_id=20548
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Made from sealing a red autumn maple leaf in plastic films, its simple and elegant look epitomizes the essence of autumn. Suitable for gifting and collecting alike.
|fame=13
|art=17
|fth=15
|civ=30
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Per Master Scroll used, Snail HP +10<br>Master Scrolls Used: 40/40
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Per Master Scroll used, Snail HP +20<br>Master Scrolls Used: 40/40
|ss3=Snail ATK +60<br>Per Master Scroll used, Snail HP +30<br>Master Scrolls Used: 40/40
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Per Master Scroll used, Snail HP +30<br>Master Scrolls Used: 40/40
|ss7=Snail ATK +60<br>Per Master Scroll used, Snail HP +30<br>Master Scrolls Used: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
